findings_addressed.description: stamps MUSIQUE_HASH without validating --corpus matches it
findings_addressed.fix: Added compute_corpus_hash() + validate_corpus_hash(); called in main() before sampling/stamping; raises ValueError on mismatch with corpus path, expected, and actual hash in message

findings_addressed.description: proportional stratified sampler rounds so --n 300 returns 299
findings_addressed.fix: Added deterministic top-up/trim after proportional allocation: if len(out) < n, extend from sorted(pool) excluding already-selected ids; if len(out) > n, trim; ensures len(sample)==n when n<=len(pool)

tdd_evidence.red_failure_mode: ImportError: cannot import name 'validate_corpus_hash' + len==299 not 300

artifact.note: body-less invariant holds; +1 question (20 paragraphs) extracted via cache-warm Qwen3.6-27B batch
